sentences.text: He quickly got off the ladder, ran through the garden, and looked over the wall.
The Miller was standing there with a big sack of flour on his back.
'Dear Hans,' said the Miller, 'could you carry this sack of flour to the market for me?'
'I'm really sorry,' said Hans, 'but I'm very busy today with my garden work.'
